name: for_video
description: Local video plugin for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO) — <video> insertion from mediapool with poster, presets and click-to-play preview

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_video/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_video/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_video/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_video/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
